active_sales.name: PlayStation Store July Savings
active_sales.note: <cite index="46-3,46-4">The PlayStation Store has a substantial sale right now, which features the lowest price ever discounts for over 250 PS5 games, including many 2026 releases, available only until July 15.</cite>

active_sales.name: EA SPORTS FC 26 Festival of Football (Pelé ICON event)
active_sales.note: <cite index="68-11">Players can log in and play FC 26 between 5 June and 24 July to earn a 93 OVR Festival of Football ICON Pelé and three 'Choose Your Journey' Evolutions.</cite> A new Phenoms Team 1 also just dropped July 10.

active_sales.name: Steam Social Deduction Fest
active_sales.note: <cite index="9-1">The next Steam sale is the Steam Social Deduction Fest, which starts on 13th July 2026</cite>, right after the Summer Sale closed July 9.

active_sales.name: Steam Summer Sale 2026 (just ended)
active_sales.note: <cite index="5-1">Steam Summer Sale 2026 ran from June 25 to July 9, 2026, with over 4,000 titles discounted around 45% on average</cite>, so residual wishlist traffic may still be converting today.

new_releases.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved
new_releases.why_it_matters: <cite index="7-15">Halo: Campaign Evolved arrives on PC on July 28, with early access opening July 23 for those who preorder.</cite> Prime opportunity to sell Xbox Game Pass Ultimate and PC keys ahead of launch.

new_releases.title: EA Sports College Football 27
new_releases.why_it_matters: <cite index="69-7">EA SPORTS College Football 27 launched worldwide on July 9, bringing the new era of college football to life.</cite> Fresh sports title demand for game keys/points.

new_releases.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag: Resynced
new_releases.why_it_matters: <cite index="16-6">Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced released July 9, 2026 on PS5, Xbox, PC</cite>, one of the month's headline remakes worth stocking as a key.

new_releases.title: Palworld 1.0
new_releases.why_it_matters: <cite index="18-1,18-2">Palworld is scheduled for release on Jul 10, 2026 and is the most anticipated game this month</cite>, and it's also joining Xbox Game Pass, driving subscription demand.

new_releases.title: GTA 6 (pre-orders live now)
new_releases.why_it_matters: <cite index="41-6,41-13">GTA 6 launches November 19, 2026 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S with pre-orders live worldwide, and purchasers before Nov 20 get the Vintage Vice City Pack plus one month of GTA+ membership.</cite> Huge ongoing hype driving wallet/pre-order demand months in advance.

streamer_trends.why_it_matters: <cite index="34-1,34-6">Kai Cenat's comeback stream peaked at roughly 708,000 concurrent viewers on Twitch and over 400,000 on YouTube, surpassing one million combined live viewers</cite> — a massive spike in gaming/streaming attention that loot.tn can ride with timely social content.
<cite index="24-1,24-5">xQc usually streams Just Chatting, Counter-Strike 2, VALORANT</cite>, keeping Steam-based competitive shooters trending — good tie-in for Steam wallet codes.

<cite index="53-1,53-2">A Tunisian streamer active on Kick is known for his gaming sessions on FIFA while also working as a radio host and football commentator</cite>, directly relevant to promoting FC 26 points/accounts to the local Tunisian audience.

<cite index="42-31">GTA 6's second trailer pulled in over 60 million views in its first 24 hours</cite>, meaning countless streamers across platforms are reacting to and discussing it right now, keeping GTA6 pre-order interest extremely high.

recommendations.action: Launch a 'GTA 6 Ready' bundle: PSN/Xbox wallet top-up cards paired with GTA+ style messaging, marketed now through November.
recommendations.reason: GTA6 pre-orders are already live with a Nov 19 launch and a pre-order bonus tied to purchasing before Nov 20, so demand for PSN/Xbox wallet funds to pre-order will build steadily for months.

recommendations.action: Push EA Sports FC 26 Ultimate Team points and account listings hard right now, referencing the Phenoms Team 1 drop and the Pelé ICON Festival of Football event (ends July 24).
recommendations.reason: FC 26's live promos (Phenoms, Summer Stars, Pelé event) are driving daily FUT engagement and points spending through late July, and this resonates with Tunisia's strong FIFA/FC streaming culture.

recommendations.action: Run a 48-hour 'Last Chance' banner for PSN wallet codes tied to the PS Store's ongoing sale of 250+ PS5 games at lowest-ever prices.
recommendations.reason: The PlayStation sale window closes around July 15, giving a natural urgency deadline to convert wallet-code sales this week.

recommendations.action: Feature Xbox Game Pass Ultimate keys around Halo: Campaign Evolved's July 23 early access and July 28 launch, plus cross-promote Palworld 1.0 (July 10) as already included in Game Pass.
recommendations.reason: Two high-profile Game Pass tie-ins land within days of each other, making this a strong window to sell subscription keys before/at launch.

recommendations.action: Capitalize on the Kai Cenat comeback buzz with a short social post bundling streaming/subscription products (e.g., YouTube Premium, Discord Nitro) alongside game keys.
recommendations.reason: The record-breaking comeback stream renewed massive mainstream attention on streaming culture this week, offering a soft-sell opportunity for adjacent subscription products loot.tn carries.

site_notes: The homepage snapshot returned only a 'Payment required / DEPLOYMENT_DISABLED' error string instead of real content — this looks like the storefront or its CDN/deployment is currently down or misconfigured and should be checked urgently, since none of today's promotions can run if the site itself isn't rendering.
